hero_subtitle: SFTY unifies wallet monitoring, transaction risk, and source-of-funds analysis into a single workflow to help OTC desks manage on-chain risks with clear audit trails and case management.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Wallet risk visibility is limited and fragmented
problem_description: OTC desks struggle to connect wallet activity and transaction risk across multiple providers, creating gaps in source and destination of funds analysis. This fragmentation slows risk assessment and weakens audit readiness for high-value digital asset transactions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction risk, provider outputs and source-to-destination analysis into one structured case workflow for OTC desks managing high-value digital asset reviews.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects wallet risk signals, provider alerts and transaction data to structured case reviews, evidence preservation and compliance decisions for OTC desks.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet screening, transaction risk and source-of-funds analysis into structured cases, decisions and evidence so OTC desks gain clearer compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports OTC desks with controlled wallet risk review, audit-ready evidence preservation and governance suited to enterprise deployment and bank due diligence requirements.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for OTC desk compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides OTC desks a connected compliance layer to connect wallet risk, transaction monitoring, source and destination fund analysis, and case management into one operational workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support wallet risk screening?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals from KYT and analytics providers, linking them to customers, transactions and cases for consistent risk review and alert triage.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence for each wallet and transaction review, enabling audit-ready records for internal and external inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening systems to connect outputs into structured compliance workflows without replacing current providers.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace wallet risk or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above wallet risk and KYT providers, organizing their outputs into workflows, decisions, evidence and reports without replacing the underlying services.
final_title: Structure OTC wallet risk reviews with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY connects wallet screening, transaction monitoring and source-of-funds analysis into audit-ready cases and workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
